preliminary_expected_failure.reason: Before CP00-065 evidence files existed, RP00 validator correctly reported only missing manifest, command evidence, Claude review result, adjudication, and construction inspection artifacts for RP00.P05.M05.S01-RP00.P05.M05.S10.

claude_review_command.command: cat prompt and /tmp/cp00-065-review.diff | claude -p --model claude-opus-4-8 --effort max --permission-mode dontAsk --tools "" --output-format json

invalid_claude_attempts.reason: Claude output stopped after saying it would verify repo facts and did not provide findings or a verdict.
invalid_claude_attempts.result_preview:

notes: No real client, matter, document, billing, settlement, credential, or secret data was used.

Claude returned P0=0, P1=0, P2=0, P3=0.
Final commands are rerun after these pack evidence files are written so the evidence refs are live.
